rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCANS FOR LIVABLE NEIGHBORHOODS, AN UNIN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, January 27, 2009, line 6, Motion for entry of writ is Granted in part and denied in part. Petitioner is to prepare a proposed writ that states that respondent City and County of San Francisco is restrained from enforcing only the following: New Policy 11.8, New Policy 11.1, Modified policy 11.9, modified policy 11.6, modified policy 11.5, New policy 1.7, new implementation 1.6, omission of policy 2-4, omission of objective 2, new policy 11.7, new policy 1.2, language added to policy 1.1, and new implementation 1.1. =(302/CWW/PB)
